formula_inventory.source_equation_coverage: Paper equations (1)-(39), Appendix A functions, and Appendix B calibration ratios were summarized. Several compact or OCR-damaged formulas are explicitly marked needs_review.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper or appendix.
